basics.name: Ahmet Canberk Baykal
basics.label: PhD Researcher
basics.summary: PhD student in Computer Science at the University of Cambridge. Researching 3D Computer Vision, including 3D capture and reconstruction. Also interested in image generation and editing, and natural language processing.

work.name: University of Cambridge – CORE Lab
work.summary: Research in 3D Computer Vision, including 3D capture and reconstruction.

work.name: Koç University – KUIS AI Center
work.summary: Research at the intersection of Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing, focusing on language-guided image generation and manipulation.
highlights: Supervisors: Prof. Aykut Erdem and Prof. Deniz Yuret

work.name: INFINIA Mühendislik
work.summary: LED controls on a Model Automation System using Raspberry Pi 3 Model B+ and LED control interface using ESP8266 Wi-Fi Module.

volunteer.organization: University of Cambridge – Computer Science Department
volunteer.summary: Supervisions for Machine Learning and Bayesian Inference.
Teaching assistant for multiple graduate and undergraduate courses.
highlights: COMP106 – Discrete Mathematics for Computer Science and Engineering
Research Areas: Computer Vision, Computer Graphics
Cambridge Trust & Computer Science Premium Scholarship

awards.title: Cambridge Trust & Computer Science Premium Scholarship
awards.summary: Full PhD scholarship covering tuition and living costs, 2023–2026.

awards.summary: Covers 100% of tuition and monthly stipends, 2016–2020.

awards.title: Scholarship of the Turkish Prime Ministry
awards.summary: Monthly stipends for outstanding performance in the Nationwide University Entrance Exam (LYS), 2016–2020.

awards.title: Top 100 Nationwide – University Entrance Exam LYS
